title: Cattleya × marciae
taxonomy: Cattleya × marciae is a hybrid orchid, specifically classified within the genus Cattleya of the subtribe Laeliinae. This subtribe is part of the tribe Epidendreae within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The species is often categorized as a member of the subgenus Cattleyella. It is a cross between Cattleya warscewiczii and Cattleya lueddemanniana. This classification helps distinguish Cattleya × marciae from other orchid species and hybrids.

intro: Cattleya × marciae, commonly known as Marcia's Cattleya, is a hybrid orchid species in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections.
